name: repo-health-check
description: 3-step repo health check: observe state, verify bench 26/26, confirm npm pack includes workflow driver.

steps.instruction:
Run these two commands and report what you find:
  git status --short
  git log --oneline -5
Summarize: any uncommitted changes, untracked files, and the last 5 commits.

Run the shell benchmark:
  node packages/cli/scripts/shell_benchmark.cjs
All 26 tests must pass (exit 0). Report the score line and which cases passed or failed.

Run the npm pack dry-run for the CLI package:
  npm pack --dry-run --json --prefix packages/cli
Confirm that scripts/scbe_workflow.cjs appears in the file list.
steps.done_if: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const out=execSync('npm pack --dry-run --json',{cwd:'packages/cli',encoding:'utf8'});const files=JSON.parse(out)[0].files.map(f=>f.path);if(!files.some(f=>f.includes('scbe_workflow')))throw new Error('scbe_workflow.cjs missing');console.log('OK: '+files.length+' files')"
